source_text: The monitoring application should evaluate telemetry freshness under a strict control deadline. Telemetry should be considered useful only when the bounded Observation cycle delivers fresh notifications quickly enough for control monitoring.
supported_requirements: Estimate telemetry freshness under a strict control deadline.
Report bounded cycle completion and expected received notifications.
assumptions: The strict deadline profile is injected into the generated UPPAAL XML through OBSERVATION_DEADLINE and SMC query bounds.
The bounded observation SMC profile is used as the executable reliability model.
